medical_history.history_of_present_illness: This is a ___ year old man with past medical history of pancreatitis s/p diverting hepaticojejunostomy, cholecystectomy and side-to-side pancreaticojejunostomy, recent admission for GI bleed (___) thought to be secondary to portal vein stenosis and varices, prompting ___ Y-stent placement to the portal vein, course complicated by partial stent obstruction requiring thrombectomy and TIPS stent placement, discharged on anticoagulation with lovenox bridge to coumadin. He presented today with 3 episodes of maroon blood per rectum, with one maroon stool in the evening and 2 the next morning, prompting visit to ED.
